free_text: Nuclear structure of 17Ne by the three-neutron pickup
Institute of Particle and Nuclear Physics
- Target-thickness: A pressure of 21 cm Hg
- Calibration: The spectrum at theta(lab)=10 deg. was
calibrated in energy using the known states of 21Mg
al., Nucl. Phys. A537(1992)153] in the same
Plastic scintillator for energy and TOF
The final values of the uncertainties were
estimated to be about 10 % for the forward
angles to 30 % for some states in the backward
See NRDF D1911 DATA,11 for detail.
The excitation energies and the uncertainties
for the states observed in 17Ne are 0.0MeV,
